---
title: "My Assignments"
---

On this page, I present the assignments I completed for the **EMU430 Data Analytics** course at Hacettepe University.

You can use the menu on the left side to navigate between Assignment 1 and Assignment 2.

These assignments include data analysis tasks and course-related exercises completed during the Spring 2026 semester.

The most recent update to this page was made on **15/03/2026**.
